vulnerabilities.description: Missing security header: HSTS
vulnerabilities.remediation: Add Strict-Transport-Security header to responses

vulnerabilities.description: Missing security header: CSP
vulnerabilities.remediation: Add Content-Security-Policy header to responses

vulnerabilities.description: Missing security header: Clickjacking Protection
vulnerabilities.remediation: Add X-Frame-Options header to responses

vulnerabilities.description: Missing security header: MIME Sniffing Protection
vulnerabilities.remediation: Add X-Content-Type-Options header to responses

vulnerabilities.description: Missing security header: XSS Protection
vulnerabilities.remediation: Add X-XSS-Protection header to responses

vulnerabilities.description: Missing security header: Referrer Policy
vulnerabilities.remediation: Add Referrer-Policy header to responses

vulnerabilities.description: Missing security header: Permissions Policy
vulnerabilities.remediation: Add Permissions-Policy header to responses

vulnerabilities.description: X-Powered-By header exposes server technology
vulnerabilities.remediation: Remove X-Powered-By header

vulnerabilities.description: Dangerous HTTP method allowed: PUT
vulnerabilities.remediation: Disable PUT method if not required

vulnerabilities.description: Dangerous HTTP method allowed: DELETE
vulnerabilities.remediation: Disable DELETE method if not required

vulnerabilities.description: Dangerous HTTP method allowed: CONNECT
vulnerabilities.remediation: Disable CONNECT method if not required

vulnerabilities.description: Dangerous HTTP method allowed: OPTIONS
vulnerabilities.remediation: Disable OPTIONS method if not required

vulnerabilities.evidence: <!DOCTYPE html><html lang="en" class="theme-scroll-bar scroll-smooth"><head><meta charSet="utf-8" data-next-head=""/><link rel="dns-prefetch" href="https://next.cdn.magiceden.dev" data-next-head=""/><
vulnerabilities.description: OS command injection vulnerability - VALIDATED uid/gid output
vulnerabilities.remediation: Never pass user input to shell commands, use safe APIs

vulnerabilities.evidence: Validated 3 secrets from 14 files: STRIPE_LIVE_PUBLIC, FIREBASE_API
vulnerabilities.description: Validated secrets exposed in JavaScript: STRIPE_LIVE_PUBLIC, FIREBASE_API
vulnerabilities.remediation: Never hardcode secrets in client-side code, rotate all exposed credentials
